request_payload.exposure_text: After the 2025 Chicago incident, where coordinated attacks exposed gaps in our domestic security, it's clear we need stronger powers to preempt threats. Critics claim expanded surveillance infringes on liberties, but the real risk is being unprepared. Our allies have already tightened protocols - shouldn't we do the same? The 2026 National Security Act would give agencies the tools they need without sacrificing our values. #SecurityFirst #ChicagoLessons
